title: White Gift Box 22x22x10cm, Premium Present Box with Magnetic Lid and Ribbon for Holidays Wedding Birthday Gift Packaging, Plaid Lining
features: JUST-RIGHT SIZE for EVERY OCCASION – Effortlessly elevate any present! Perfect sizes for jewelry, watches, skincare items, candles, perfume, bath bombs, baby socks, small tech gadgets, and keepsakes. Whether it’s for weddings, birthdays, Christmas, Valentine's Day, or corporate events, these gift boxes elevate even the simplest gift into something extraordinary.

PREMIUM & REUSABLE – Made from ultra-durable 1000g/㎡ cardboard with a frosted embossed finish, this box for gifts offers superior bending resistance and durability compared to most 800g/㎡ boxes. Its sturdy design ensures it will be cherished and repurposed by the recipient for storage long after the gift is enjoyed.

LINING PLAID - The white exterior opens to reveal a stunning, timeless British buffalo check interior. This classic, elegant detail transforms even the simplest gifts into breathtaking surprises, making the present truly unforgettable.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE - Create stunning presentations in seconds! Features clever fold-flat construction that pops into a rigid, high-end gift box instantly. Two powerful concealed magnets ensure the lid stays securely closed, protecting your precious gift inside beautifully.

TEKHOHO GUARANTEED - Discover more colours and sizes from Tekhoho! We're confident you'll adore these present boxes as much as we do. Enjoy our no-quibble 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee and dedicated, friendly customer care should you need us.
